_notes: Canonical MCP server config for nl-gov-data-plugin. Edit only this file. Run scripts/render-mcp.py to regenerate .mcp.json / .gemini/settings.json / .codex/config.toml / .vscode/mcp.json.

nl-gov-data._notes: Dutch government open-data MCP — search/fetch legislation, parliamentary records, Rijksoverheid documents. Per-user OAuth via Microsoft Entra ID.

stromy-format._notes: Hosted format skills (pptx, pptx-hd, docx, pdf, pdf-hd, xlsx, mermaid, diagram, chart). Fetched at runtime via ReadMcpResourceTool — see skills/<name>/SKILL.md stubs.
